title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.240 - Inspector's oath
text:
351.240.  Inspector's oath. — Any inspector, before he shall enter on the duties of his office, shall take and subscribe the following oath before any officer authorized by law to administer oaths:  "I do solemnly swear, that I will execute the duties of an inspector of the election now to be held with strict impartiality, and according to the best of my ability.".
(RSMo 1939 § 5002, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 30) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4531; 1919 § 9727; 1909 § 2968
